purpose: Track a long-running Studio workstream from objective through passes, blockers, proof, and closeout.

required_fields.approved_guardrails: Guardrails under which agents may continue.
required_fields.stop_conditions: Hard blockers that stop autonomous continuation.
required_fields.continue_conditions: Conditions allowing the next slice/pass to start.
required_fields.non_blockers: Logged issues that do not stop continuation.

optional_fields.final_report_path: Final run report path when complete.

proof_validation_expectations: Hard blocker list is present before autonomous continuation.
Cost state explicitly records whether $50 approval is relevant.
Each completed pass links to a proof packet.
No pass claims completion without fixed/added/proved/deferred/risk/next.
